name: agent-skills
description: Reusable AI agent skills for coding workflows
author: Paulo Campos

skills.name: commit-pattern
skills.description: Use ao commitar para aplicar formato padronizado com ícones, scope, flags de IA, rodar verificações de qualidade antes do commit e fazer push automático.

skills.name: project-docs
skills.description: Automatically maintains project documentation up-to-date whenever code changes affect documented features. Creates and updates vision, architecture, roadmap, changelog, and decisions.

skills.name: vercel-deploy
skills.description: Automatically deploys to Vercel with Discord notifications via GitHub Actions. Includes setup wizard, staging/production routing, and troubleshooting.
